title: Leptocarpus ejuncidus
taxonomy: Leptocarpus ejuncidus is a species of sedge in the family Restionaceae. This species belongs to the genus Leptocarpus and is native to Australia. The classification of Leptocarpus ejuncidus is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Poales, family Restionaceae, genus Leptocarpus, and species L. ejuncidus. Leptocarpus ejuncidus is further divided into several subspecies and varieties based on geographical distribution and morphological characteristics. Further research and analysis are needed to provide a comprehensive understanding of the taxonomic classification of this species.
